understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place all selectable pieces (P and S) simultaneously onto all '+' goal tiles to clear each level, progressing through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in the chosen direction pixel by pixel on a grid where cells are 3x3 pixels. Adjacent blocks can be pushed. Walls block movement. CLICK with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at those exact pixel coordinates. The semantic grid shows P for current piece, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals, and . for empty.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place all selectable pieces (P and S) simultaneously onto all '+' goal tiles to clear each level, progressing through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in the chosen direction pixel by pixel on a grid where cells are 3x3 pixels. Adjacent blocks can be pushed. Walls block movement. CLICK with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at those exact pixel coordinates. The semantic grid shows P for current piece, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals, and . for empty.
